---
name: Feature Request
about: Got an idea? Drop it here.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like FREQ to do?

Describe the feature or behavior you'd like.

## Why does it matter?

What problem does this solve? How does it help your workflow?

## How should it work?

Describe the expected behavior — CLI flags, output format, etc.

## Would you help build it?

Let us know if you're interested in contributing the implementation.
